title: Professional Fashion Design Sketch Tech Pack Layout
sourceTitle: Professional Fashion Design Sketch Tech Pack Layout
prompt: A professional fashion design sketch and tech pack layout presented on a textured, off-white background with a vertical orientation. The central focus is a full-length illustration of a blonde female model with wavy hair, posing in a three-quarter stance, wearing a coastal-inspired resort maxi dress. The dress features a high structured collar, a laser-cut coral-patterned front panel, split-sleeve details with button closures, and a tiered, pleated A-line skirt with a braided rope belt in shades of linen-beige and seafoam blue. To the right, smaller detailed sketches display the back view of the garment, a close-up of the hand-cut linen appliqué embellishment, and a minimalist silhouette breakdown. Surrounding the illustrations are elegant handwritten design notes, a "COASTAL ELEGANCE RESORT '25 COLLECTION" title in a flowing script, a soft coastal color palette scheme, a small textured fabric swatch, and a poetic quote at the bottom flanked by a subtle seashell emblem and a stylized monogram logo instead of a signature name.
